name: Chromie
description: A long range, high burst damage Mage, who requires good timing and setup.
title: Keeper of Time
info: At first glance, Chromie appears to be an ordinary gnome. In truth, she is Chronormu, Bronze Dragon and a master of time. When it comes to temporal manipulation there's no problem she can't solve... with some help from her future self, of course.

Chromie.name: Sand Blast
Chromie.description: After 0.5 seconds, fire a missile that deals 305 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy hit. Deals 50% damage to Structures.  Casting Sand Blast leaves an Echo behind that mimics Chromie's Sand Blast and Basic Attack, dealing 40% damage. Maximum of 1 Echo active at a time.

Chromie.name: Dragon's Breath
Chromie.description: Vector Targeting Launch 3 blasts into the air that land every 0.75 seconds towards the targeted direction, dealing 215 (+4% per level) damage each.

Chromie.name: Time Trap
Chromie.description: Place a Time Trap that arms and Stealths after 2 seconds. Chromie's Trait can be activated to detonate the trap, placing all nearby allied or enemy Heroes in Time Stop for 2 seconds. Maximum of 1 trap active at a time.

Chromie.name: Temporal Loop
Chromie.description: Choose an enemy Hero. After 3 seconds, they are teleported back to the location where Temporal Loop was cast on them.  Basic Abilities recharge 500% faster for 3 seconds after casting Temporal Loop.

Chromie.name: Slowing Sands
Chromie.description: Summon a sand vortex that Slows enemies by 10% every 0.25 seconds, up to 70%.

Chromie.name: Timewalker
Chromie.description: Chromie has traveled to the future, and as such, will learn her Talents 2 levels earlier than her teammates!  Detonate Time Trap  Detonates active Time Traps.

1.name: Once Again the First Time
1.description: Quest: Hit 40 Heroes with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes.  Reward: Increase the maximum number of active Echoes to 2, and increase Echo damage to 45%.

1.name: Deep Breathing
1.description: Quest: Every time Dragon's Breath hits a Hero increase its damage by 1%, up to 20%.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, reduce the cooldown of Dragon's Breath by 4 seconds and its Mana cost from 65 to 40.

1.name: Timewalker's Pursuit
1.description: Gain 15% Spell Power and reduce the arming time of Time Traps by 0.75 seconds. Activate to reveal the targeted area for 4 seconds. Enemies seen are revealed for 4 seconds.

4.name: Chronic Conditions
4.description: After its Time Stop ends, enemies affected by Time Trap are Slowed by 30% for 3 seconds and allies gain 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.

4.name: Time Troubles
4.description: After its Time Stop ends, enemies affected by Time Trap lose 15 Armor for 3 seconds and allies gain 30 Armor for 3 seconds.

4.name: Andorhal Anomaly
4.description: Increase the charges and maximum active Time Traps to 3, and reduce its cooldown by 8 seconds.

7.name: Bronze Talons
7.description: Hitting a Hero with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes grants 50% additional Basic Attack damage for 5 seconds.

7.name: Mobius Loop
7.description: Dragon's Breath deals 30% bonus damage to enemies hit by its center. Enemy Heroes hit by its center are Slowed by 40% for 0.75 seconds.

7.name: A Proper Greeting
7.description: Damaging a Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemy Hero grants 20% additional damage for 3 seconds.

10.name: Slowing Sands
10.description: Summon a sand vortex that Slows enemies by 10% every 0.25 seconds, up to 70%.

10.name: Temporal Loop
10.description: Choose an enemy Hero. After 3 seconds, they are teleported back to the location where Temporal Loop was cast on them.  Basic Abilities recharge 500% faster for 3 seconds after casting Temporal Loop.

13.name: Gnome Speed Ahead!
13.description: After casting Sand Blast, Chromie gains 20% Movement Speed and 200% increased Health Regeneration for 3 seconds.

13.name: Here and There
13.description: Activate to teleport to an area near an Echo, swapping it with Chromie's previous location.

13.name: Time Out
13.description: Activate to place Chromie in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for up to 5 seconds. Can be reactivated to end the effect early.

16.name: Shifting Sands
16.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Chromie's primary Sand Blast grants 5% Spell Power for 8 seconds, up to a maximum of 50%. The duration is refreshed whenever an enemy is damaged by the primary Sand Blast.

16.name: Fast Forward
16.description: If Chromie's primary Sand Blast travels at least 50% of its base distance and hits a Hero, its cooldown is reduced to 0.5 seconds and it refunds 10 Mana.

16.name: Quantum Overdrive
16.description: Activate to increase Spell Power by 30% for 8 seconds. Hitting an enemy Hero with Sand Blast reduces this cooldown by 3 seconds.

20.name: Unravelling
20.description: Every 0.25 seconds, enemy Heroes Slowed by Slowing Sands have their Spell Armor reduced by 10 up to 50.  Passive: Increase Slowing Sands cast range by 50%, and Slowing Sands persists for 5 seconds after it is cancelled.

20.name: Stuck in a Loop
20.description: Temporal Loop teleports the target a second time after the first, and Basic Abilities continue recharging for an additional 3 seconds. Increase the cooldown recharge rate from 500% to 700%.

20.name: Piercing Sands
20.description: Sand Blasts cast from Chromie and her Echoes now pierce all enemies hit.

20.name: Blessing of the Bronze
20.description: Activate to cause Chromie and all allied Heroes to gain 20% Movement Speed and their Basic Abilities recharge 35% faster for 8 seconds.  Hitting an enemy Hero with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes reduces the cooldown of Blessing of the Bronze by 1 second.

tooltipMarkup.ChromieAProperGreeting: Damaging a Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemy Hero grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieAProperGreetingDamageIncrease,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]*100"/>%</c> additional damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieAProperGreetingDamageIncrease,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieBlessingOfTheBronze: Activate to cause Chromie and all allied Heroes to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieBlessingOfTheBronzeIncreasedMovementSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> Movement Speed and their Basic Abilities recharge <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-(Effect,ChromieBlessingOfTheBronzeDummyCDRVariable,XP/Behavior,ChromieBlessingOfTheBronzeCDR,Period)*100"/>%</c> faster for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieBlessingOfTheBronzeIncreasedMovementSpeed,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Hitting an enemy Hero with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes reduces the cooldown of Blessing of the Bronze by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ChromieSandBlastBlessingOfTheBronzeCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieDragonsBreath: <c val="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>Launch <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChromieDragonsBreathInitialPersistent,PeriodCount-3"/></c> blasts into the air that land every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChromieDragonsBreathOffsetPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[1]+.0625" precision="2"/></c> seconds towards the targeted direction, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChromieDragonsBreathDamage,Amount"/></c> damage each.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieDragonsBreathDeepBreathing: Quest: Every time Dragon's Breath hits a Hero increase its damage by %, up to %.Reward: After hitting Heroes, reduce the cooldown of Dragon's Breath by seconds and its Mana cost from 65 to .
tooltipMarkup.ChromieDragonsBreathMobiusLoop: Dragon's Breath deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ChromieDragonsBreathDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ChromieDragonsBreathDragonsEye].Modifier"/>%</c> bonus damage to enemies hit by its center. Enemy Heroes hit by its center are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ChromieDragonsBreathMobiusLoopSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieDragonsBreathMobiusLoopSlow,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieHereAndThere: Activate to teleport to an area near an Echo, swapping it with Chromie's previous location.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieQuantumOverdrive: Activate to increase Spell Power by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieQuantumOverdriveBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*(100)"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieQuantumOverdriveBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds. Hitting an enemy Hero with Sand Blast reduces this cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ChromieQuantumOverdriveModifyPlayerCooldown,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieSandBlast: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ChromieSandBlast,CastIntroTime[0]"Precision="1"/></c> seconds, fire a missile that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChromieSandBlastDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the first enemy hit. Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ChromieSandBlastDamage,AttributeFactor[Structure]*100"/>%</c> damage to Structures.<n/><n/>Casting Sand Blast leaves an Echo behind that mimics Chromie's Sand Blast and Basic Attack, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(1+Effect,ChromieSandBlastPastAndFutureMeDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[PastandFutureMe].Modifier)*100"/>%</c> damage. Maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromiePastAndFutureMeTracker,MaxTrackedUnits" player="0"/></c> Echo active at a time.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieSandBlastBronzeTalons: Hitting a Hero with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ChromieHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BronzeTalons].Modifier"/>%</c> additional Basic Attack damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieSandBlastBronzeTalonsDamageIncrease,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieSandBlastFastForward: If Chromie's primary Sand Blast travels at least <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,ChromieFastForwardDistanceCheck,Range/Effect,ChromieSandBlastLaunchMissile,ImpactLocation.ProjectionDistanceScale*100"/>%</c> of its base distance and hits a Hero, its cooldown is reduced to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChromieSandBlastFastForwardCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="2"/></c> seconds and it refunds <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChromieSandBlastFastForwardCreateManaHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieSandBlastGnomeSpeedAhead: After casting Sand Blast, Chromie gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieSandBlastGnomeSpeedAheadIncreasedMovementSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> Movement Speed and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieSandBlastGnomeSpeedAheadRegeneration,Modification.VitalRegenMultiplier[0]*100"/>%</c> increased Health Regeneration for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieSandBlastGnomeSpeedAheadRegeneration,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieSandBlastOnceAgaintheFirstTime: Quest: Hit Heroes with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes.Reward: Increase the maximum number of active Echoes to , and increase Echo damage to %.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieSandBlastPiercingSands: Sand Blasts cast from Chromie and her Echoes now pierce all enemies hit.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieSandBlastShiftingSands: Hitting an enemy Hero with Chromie's primary Sand Blast grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieSandBlastShiftingSandsBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*(100)"/>%</c> Spell Power for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieSandBlastShiftingSandsBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds, up to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieSandBlastShiftingSandsBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*Behavior,ChromieSandBlastShiftingSandsBuff,MaxStackCount*(100)"/>%</c>. The duration is refreshed whenever an enemy is damaged by the primary Sand Blast.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieSlowingSands: Summon a sand vortex that Slows enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,ChromieSlowingSandsTargetBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChromieSlowingSandsCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="2"/></c> seconds, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,ChromieSlowingSandsTargetBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*Behavior,ChromieSlowingSandsTargetBehavior,MaxStackCount*100" precision="2"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieSlowingSandsUnravelling: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChromieSlowingSandsCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="2"/></c> seconds, enemy Heroes Slowed by Slowing Sands have their Spell Armor reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,ChromieSlowingSandsUnravellingArmorDebuff,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,ChromieSlowingSandsUnravellingArmorDebuff,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]*Behavior,ChromieSlowingSandsUnravellingArmorDebuff,ArmorModification.StackCount"/></c>.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Slowing Sands cast range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ChromieSlowingSandsUnravelling,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value/Abil,ChromieSlowingSands,Range*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c>, and Slowing Sands persists for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieSlowingSandsCancelDelay,Duration"/></c> seconds after it is cancelled.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieTemporalLoop: Choose an enemy Hero. After <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, they are teleported back to the location where Temporal Loop was cast on them.<n/><n/>Basic Abilities recharge <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ChromieTemporalLoopModifyCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse/Behavior,ChromieTemporalLoopBuff,Period*100" player="0"/>%</c> faster for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTemporalLoopBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds after casting Temporal Loop.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieTemporalLoopStuckInALoop: Temporal Loop teleports the target a second time after the first, and Basic Abilities continue recharging for an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ChromieTemporalLoopStuckInALoop,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds. Increase the cooldown recharge rate from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ChromieTemporalLoopModifyCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse/Behavior,ChromieTemporalLoopBuff,Period*100" player="0"/>%</c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-(Effect,ChromieTemporalLoopModifyCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse+Talent,ChromieTemporalLoopStuckInALoop,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value)/Behavior,ChromieTemporalLoopBuff,Period*100" player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieTimeOutHotbar: Activate to place Chromie in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTimeOutBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds. Can be reactivated to end the effect early.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieTimeTrap: Place a Time Trap that arms and Stealths after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTimeTrapArmingBehavior,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds. Chromie's Trait can be activated to detonate the trap, placing all nearby allied or enemy Heroes in Time Stop for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTimeTrapTargetBehavior,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTimeTrapUnitTracker,MaxTrackedUnits" player="0"/></c> trap active at a time.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieTimeTrapAndorhalAnomaly: Increase the charges and maximum active Time Traps to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTimeTrapUnitTracker,MaxTrackedUnits+Talent,ChromieTimeTrapAndorhalAnomaly,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[3].Value" player="0"/></c>, and reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,ChromieTimeTrapAndorhalAnomaly,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[4].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieTimeTrapChronicConditions: After its Time Stop ends, enemies affected by Time Trap are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,ChromieTimeTrapChronicConditionsSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTimeTrapChronicConditionsSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds and allies gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTimeTrapChronicConditionsIncreasedMovementSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTimeTrapChronicConditionsIncreasedMovementSpeed,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieTimeTrapTimeTroubles: After its Time Stop ends, enemies affected by Time Trap lose <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,ChromieTimeTrapTimeTroublesReduceArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTimeTrapTimeTroublesReduceArmor,Duration"/></c> seconds and allies gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTimeTrapTimeTroublesGainArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTimeTrapTimeTroublesGainArmor,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieTimewalkerTrait: Chromie has traveled to the future, and as such, will learn her Talents <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> levels earlier than her teammates!<n/><n/><s val="StandardTooltipHeader">Detonate Time Trap</s><n/><n/>Detonates active Time Traps.
tooltipMarkup.ChromieTimewalkersPursuit: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ChromieTimewalkersPursuitQuestCompleteAbilityPower,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]"/>%</c> Spell Power and reduce the arming time of Time Traps by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,ChromieTimewalkersPursuit,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Activate to reveal the targeted area for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChromieTimewalkersPursuitRevealPersistent,PeriodCount*Effect,ChromieTimewalkersPursuitRevealPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/></c> seconds. Enemies seen are revealed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChromieTimewalkersPursuitRevealer,Duration"/></c> seconds.
